category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an All-Apache Java EE 7 Web Profile stack; source_facts.homepage is the official Apache TomEE site.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is tomee-webprofile and source_facts.description identifies the Web Profile distribution.
docs_sources: Official Apache TomEE documentation page at tomee.apache.org/latest/docs/documentation.html.
repo_sources: Official Apache TomEE sources page says TomEE is on GitHub at https://github.com/apache/tomee and also lists Apache Git master sources.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Java EE 7 Web Profile; source_facts.homepage identifies Apache TomEE.
